review_note: Reviewed 2026-06-22: Gorizia and Gradisca was a Habsburg crown-land/littoral unit, not child-to-candidate parentage under the Archduchy of Austria.
Reviewed 2026-06-22: Comtat Venaissin and Ferrara were separate papal territories, not child-to-candidate parentage.
Reviewed 2026-06-22: Prince-Bishopric of Montenegro is sourced as an Ottoman-vassal then independent Montenegrin theocracy, not child-to-candidate parentage under the Eastern Hungarian Kingdom.
Reviewed 2026-06-22: Grand Duchy of Finland and Kingdom of Imereti were separate Russian imperial possessions, not child-to-candidate parentage.
Reviewed 2026-06-22: sources identify Nassau and Brandenburg as separate Holy Roman Empire states, not child-to-candidate parentage.
